case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY VS SCOTT, VALINDA R.

docket_entries.description: COPIES OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT SENT TO PARTIES.
RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 771749 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT, VALINDA R.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCOTT, VALINDA R. $1,684.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,684.00, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE #771749. JUDGMENT ENTERED ON APRIL 23, 1998. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,213.92 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $1,243.15 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT, VALINDA R.
